qa_pair.question: Which tool would you call to persist a single LLM execution run record?
Which tool aggregates audit metrics, tokens, latencies, and computes costs?
Which tool uses rolling statistics to detect anomalous model performance calls?
Which database table stores the audit execution trace records?
What metric represents local compute resource usage (returned in get_stats)?
What statistical score is used to detect latency or token consumption anomalies?
What is the default z-score threshold (k) for flagging outliers in audit_flag_anomaly?
Can stats be aggregated and filtered selectively by a single pipeline run ID?
What notional pricing currency is configured by default for prompt audit stats?
Is local compute cost reported as $0.0 or a non-zero value?
